title: scoria
intro: Scoria, also known as Scoria plant or Scoria root, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Scoria include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as its ability to act as a natural diuretic and antacid. Scoria can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder for various herbal preparations, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
